@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "grpc-29262-a-solution-to-build-apple-silicon-m1-python-binary-wheels",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: A solution to build Apple Silicon (M1) Python binary wheels",
+    "description": "A solution to build Apple Silicon (M1) Python binary wheels. This issue affects 37+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your grpc setup:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nCheck your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\nCurrently, the `grpcio` Python package does not distribute functioning binary wheels for the Apple Silicon (M1 processor family) architecture."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for A solution to build Apple Silicon (M1) Python binary wheels",
+        "description": "While  is 💯 % right and I can't wait to get a pre-built binary for arm64 arch -- the workaround for those looking for one: \n\n```\npip install --ignore-installed --no-binary grpcio grpcio\n```\n\nMy team and I use Poetry and I first have to create the env and manually do this command every time,\n```yaml\nversion: 2.1\n\njobs:\n  build-grpcio-apple-silicon-wheel:\n    working_directory: ~/grpcio-wheels\n    macos:\n      xcode: << parameters.xcode_version >>\n\n    parameters:\n      python_build_version:\n        type: string\n        description: The Python version to build the wheel for\n      xcode_version:\n        type: string\n        description: The Xcode version for the CircleCI executor\n        default: 13.3.0\n\n    environment:\n      CIBW_ARCHS_MACOS: \"arm64\"\n      CIBW_TEST_SKIP: \"*_arm64\"\n      CIBW_BUILD: \"<< parameters.python_build_version >>-macosx_arm64\"\n      CIBW_BUILD_FRONTEND: pip\n      \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm A solution to build Apple Silicon (M1) Python… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "While  is 💯 % right and I can't wait to get a pre-built binary for arm64 arch -- the workaround for those looking for one: \n\n```\npip install --ignore-installed --no-binary grpcio grpcio\n```\n\nMy team and I use Poetry and I first have to create the env and manually do this command every time, however, it is a workaround that allows our Py310 interpreter to build from source and have a functioning",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "version: 2.1\n\njobs:\n  build-grpcio-apple-silicon-wheel:\n    working_directory: ~/grpcio-wheels\n    macos:\n      xcode: << parameters.xcode_version >>\n\n    parameters:\n      python_build_version:\n        type: string\n        description: The Python version to build the wheel for\n      xcode_version:\n        type: string\n        description: The Xcode version for the CircleCI executor\n        default: 13.3.0\n\n    environment:\n      CIBW_ARCHS_MACOS: \"arm64\"\n      CIBW_TEST_SKIP: \"*_arm64\"\n      CIBW_BUILD: \"<< parameters.python_build_version >>-macosx_arm64\"\n      CIBW_BUILD_FRONTEND: pip\n      CIBW_ENVIRONMENT_MACOS: \"GRPC_PYTHON_BUILD_WITH_CYTHON=1\"\n      CIBW_BEFORE_BUILD: \"pip install -r requirements.txt\"\n    steps:\n      - run:\n          name: Install cibuildwheel\n          command: |\n ",
+        "2) Hosted grpcio"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "grpc",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "grpc"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/29262",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/grpc/grpc"
+    },
+    "reactions": 37,
+    "comments": 18,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "protoc"
+    ],
+    "description": "gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)"
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:41:41.741Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
